headline: Strong AI Vision and End-Market Diversification Aids CGNX's Prospects
summary: Cognex pushes AI-driven machine vision with new products and cloud tools as diversified end markets and a sales overhaul aim to expand adoption and double its customer base.

headline: Western Digital vs Seagate After the Sell-Off: One Storage Rival Is a Clear Winner
summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) and Seagate Technology (NASDAQ: STX) both got hit in the March 3, 2026, sell-off as Iran conflict fears rattled semiconductor markets and rippled into U.S. storage names. Both stocks bounced back the following day but are still off their recent peaks. Retirement-focused investors face a direct choice: which one deserves a ... headline: How Does Mozaic 4+ Position Seagate for Booming AI Data Demand?
summary: STX's Mozaic 4+ HAMR platform lands production deployment with two hyperscalers, enabling up to 44TB drives and targeting nearly 100TB storage capacity.

headline: Seagate (STX) Expands HAMR With Hyperscalers: Is Mozaic 4+ the Margin Story Investors Missed?
summary: In early March 2026, Seagate Technology announced its Mozaic 4+ HAMR-based storage platform is now qualified and in volume production with two leading hyperscale cloud providers, supporting hard drive capacities up to 44TB and promising future scaling toward 10TB per disk and 100TB drives. This qualification milestone highlights how Seagate’s in-house laser and nanophotonic engineering, plus higher capacity per watt and per rack, could make its HAMR drives a core building block for AI-era...
